ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data pertains to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source for verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("quarter") REFERENCES quarters ("quarter_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent to which the country belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source for the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the quarter (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the quarter */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user based on IP address */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
